expected_effect: Break stagnation by creating a trend analysis skill that tracks evolution metric changes over time, enabling temporal pattern detection beyond point-in-time snapshots
rationale: All 3 Innovation Catalyst ideas already implemented. System lacks temporal trend tracking — evolution-scorecard gives point-in-time health but cannot show if metrics are improving or declining. Linear regression on windowed metrics fills this gap.

preconditions: no existing temporal trend tracking skill
strategy: Identify gap: point-in-time scorecard exists but no temporal analysis
Create windowed metric computation from narrative entries
Implement linear regression for trend detection
Add inverse-metric awareness for correct semantic interpretation
Validate exports and test against real narrative data

summary: Created evo-trend-tracker skill: tracks evolution metrics (successRate, innovationRatio, velocity, zeroChangeRate) over configurable time windows using linear regression, outputs trend direction with R² confidence, highlights most improved/declined metrics.
